step_rationale: MicroRNA dysregulated in STEMI; likely regulates coagulation and platelet responses.
mechanism: miR-197-5p dysregulation in unstable angina and STEMI associates with altered coagulation and platelet activation cascades.

references.title: Unlocking the potential of microRNAs: machine learning identifies key biomarkers for myocardial infarction diagnosis.
ABHD4-Regulating RNA Panel: Novel Biomarkers in Acute Coronary Syndrome Diagnosis.
